name: material-reference
title: Material Reference
description: A dcterms:BibliographicResource related to a dwc:MaterialEntity.

fields.name: reference_fk
fields.title: Reference (Foreign Key)
fields.comments: The value in this field MAY refer to a dcterms:BibliographicResource within or external to the dataset in which this record originated.

fields.name: materialEntity_fk
fields.title: Material Entity (Foreign Key)
fields.comments: The value in this field MAY be changed in aggregation to preserve the relationship to the (Primary Key).
fields.rdfs:comment: An identifier for a particular instance of a dwc:MaterialEntity.

fields.name: relationshipType
fields.title: Relationship Type
fields.description: A relationship of a subject resource to a dcterms:BibliographicResource.
fields.comments: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary.
fields.rdfs:comment: The relationship of the subject (identified by dwc:resourceID) to the object (identified by dwc:relatedResourceID).
